videos.headline: DJ Uiagalelei ices game for Clemson with TD run
videos.description: Clemson QB DJ Uiagalelei rushes in for a 9-yard touchdown, widening the Tigers' lead late in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DJ Uiagalelei ices game for Clemson with TD run) 2022/10/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Devin Leary takes a hit, still converts long 3rd down for NC State
videos.description: NC State QB Devin Leary gets hit as he throws, but connects with Thayer Thomas to convert a third-and-16 play.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Devin Leary takes a hit, still converts long 3rd down for NC State) 2022/10/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: NC State scores game's first TD on Devin Leary's TD pass
videos.description: NC State QB Devin Leary flips it to Ced Seabrough in the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (NC State scores game's first TD on Devin Leary's TD pass) 2022/10/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: DJ Uiagalelei dives for Clemson TD
videos.description: DJ Uiagalelei dives across the goal line to give Clemson the lead late in the first half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DJ Uiagalelei dives for Clemson TD) 2022/10/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: DJ Uiagalelei breaks free for big Clemson run
videos.description: Clemson QB DJ Uiagalelei keeps it himself for a big 39-yard run.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DJ Uiagalelei breaks free for big Clemson run) 2022/10/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Uiagalelei finds Briningstool to extend Clemson's lead
videos.description: Clemson QB DJ Uiagalelei tosses to Jake Briningstool in the end zone for a touchdown to widen the Tigers' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Uiagalelei finds Briningstool to extend Clemson's lead) 2022/10/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Toriano Pride comes up with big INT for Clemson
videos.description: NC State QB Devin Leary's pass is tipped and intercepted by Clemson's Toriano Pride late in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Toriano Pride comes up with big INT for Clemson) 2022/10/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dabo Swinney amped up after Clemson fumble recovery
videos.description: NC State QB Devin Leary bobbles the snap and Clemson recovers the ball in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dabo Swinney amped up after Clemson fumble recovery) 2022/10/01 ESHEET
